title: Using LabVIEW VI Reference
description:
Using LabVIEW VI Reference

VI Reference

This section contains information for all VIs used in the Epson RC+ 8.0 LabVIEW Library.

The following information is provided for each VI:

Tool Palette	The tool palette where the VI is contained.

Description	Brief description of the function.

Inputs	Input parameters

Outputs	Output parameters

Remarks	Additional details.
